<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Fetch Plans"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/access/plans"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Return the effective plan catalog: slug -&gt; entitlement controls.

The shape mirrors what `AGENTA_ACCESS_PLANS` accepts, but fully parsed
and validated. The frontend reads `flags`, `counters`, `gauges`, and
`throttles` from here rather than slug-matching against constants.

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  {...require("./fetch-access-plans.RequestSchema.json")}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  {...require("./fetch-access-plans.StatusCodes.json")}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
